description:
Combining modern simplicity with premium craftsmanship, this brown neoprene cosmetic pouch is designed for brands that value both functionality and refined aesthetics. The classic brown body paired with elegant neutral vertical stripes creates a timeless appearance suitable for luxury beauty collections, travel accessories, promotional campaigns, and retail markets.

Crafted from high-density neoprene, the pouch delivers excellent flexibility, cushioning, and water-resistant performance. The soft yet durable construction helps protect cosmetics, skincare products, electronic accessories, and travel essentials from scratches, minor impacts, and everyday moisture.

Its slim profile provides generous storage while remaining easy to carry inside handbags, backpacks, luggage, or office totes. The reinforced zipper ensures reliable performance for daily use, making it an excellent companion for business trips, vacations, gym sessions, or everyday organization.

Guizhou O'lay Technology Co., Ltd offers comprehensive OEM and ODM manufacturing services, including custom sizing, logo application, color development, zipper accessories, packaging design, and private label production. Whether you're developing a premium cosmetic line or sourcing promotional merchandise, this neoprene pouch can be tailored to meet your brand requirements.
